name: codex-autoresearch
description: Current-chat and current-directory entrypoint for codex-autoresearch long tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Use autoresearch from the current chat via MCP and the current directory.
interface.longDescription: Start or resume codex-autoresearch tasks from the current Codex chat without manually thinking about shell commands, workdir, state-dir, or session ids. The plugin routes fixed chat phrases through MCP tools, defaults to the current directory, and decides whether to continue the latest current-directory task or start a new one.
defaultPrompt: 用 autoresearch 继续做我们当前聊天里还没完成的事情。
用 autoresearch 在当前目录开一个新任务。
用 autoresearch 处理我们当前聊天里正在讨论的需求。
